conditions.physical_address: Department of Polymer Chemistry, Center of Molecular and Macromolecular Studies, Polish Academy of Sciences, Sienkiewicza 112, PL-90-363 Lodz, Poland
conditions.evidence_text: At the critical point of adsorption, a series of linear C4H9-PLA-OH's having molar masses (Mn) in the range from 2.3 × 10³ to 7.4 × 10⁴ ... showed no dependence of the elution volumes on molar mass. ... LC-CC conditions have been used corresponding to silica gel as the stationary phase and a mixture of 1,4-dioxane/n-hexane (56.25/43.75 by vol%) at 50 °C as the mobile phase.
conditions.detector: Waters 486 tunable UV detector at 235 nm
conditions.critical_condition_basis: elution volumes showed no dependence on molar mass
conditions.notes: Critical conditions established for linear PLA used to analyze star-shaped PLA.
